channel.title: Home on Angad Muthyala | Backend Developer
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Angad Muthyala | Backend Developer

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m a backend developer based in Mumbai who cares about the full lifecycle — from designing database schemas to shipping production infrastructure. I recently built an AI-powered video interview platform from scratch as the sole backend engineer: NestJS APIs, PostgreSQL with Prisma, async job queues with Redis, WebRTC video handling, and Cloudflare R2 for media storage. It’s live with real users.

My work spans backend and infrastructure. I write APIs with NestJS and FastAPI, optimize PostgreSQL queries, and set up CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins and GitHub Actions. I also provision AWS environments with Terraform — EKS, VPC, IAM, the works — and wire up monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana.

item.title: Community
item.description:
FOSS United — Campus Lead

Conducted multiple seminars on open source — what it means, why it matters, and how to get started contributing to real projects. The goal was to demystify open source and show that you don’t need to be a senior engineer to make meaningful contributions.

Ran hands-on workshops on Linux and programming — covering the command line, Git workflows, basic shell scripting, and introductory Python/Go sessions. Focused on practical skills that students could immediately apply in their own projects or coursework.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Reach out

  • Email: angadmuthyala@gmail.com
  • GitHub: github.com/AngadVM
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/angad-muthyala
  • Resume: Download PDF

Always down to talk code, opportunities, or just what’s interesting in the market.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
AI BI Street — Interview Screener

Sole backend engineer | Nov 2025 – Apr 2026

Sole backend engineer on an AI-powered video interview platform (NestJS, Next.js, PostgreSQL) in production with active recruiter and candidate workflows. Built the full interview lifecycle: WebRTC video recording with chunked uploads, candidate invite flows, and passwordless magic-link auth across three user roles.

Designed an async media pipeline (BullMQ + Redis) for video compression, transcription, and LLM-based evaluation, with retry and job persistence. Built an AI interview-prep generator — ingests PDF resumes and job URLs, runs a 3-pass Groq editorial pipeline (generate, critique, rewrite) into structured PDF prep materials.
